---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the toolkit or an existing MCP server
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Affected Server / Package

<!-- Which MCP server or package does this relate to? Or is it a toolkit-wide feature? -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include any API ideas, config options, or tool names if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there any alternative approaches you've evaluated? Why do you prefer this solution?

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, links, related issues, or any extra context. -->
